description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel. The stock is robust and extends from the butt to the receiver, providing a solid shoulder rest. The barrel is metallic, straight, and unadorned, with a front sight post visible at the muzzle. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined beneath the receiver, and the bolt handle is slightly protruding on the right side. The rifle features iron sights, with the rear sight mounted near the receiver and the front sight at the tip of the barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with a matte finish and minimal embellishments, typical of military surplus or hunting rifles.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and iron sights. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metal barrel, and both front and rear iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, stock, and barrel, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the slim profile of the stock and barrel, with the rear sight and bolt handle slightly visible.
